message:
chore: audit batch 393 continued (6 files, ~10,712L, 0 bugs)

- grpc_verification.rs (1596L): 50 gRPC tests, status codes, codec, streaming

- doctor_remediation_unit_harness.rs (1904L): risk bands, recipes
- quic_h3_e2e.rs (1722L): QUIC lifecycle, H3 framing, drain timeout
- lean_invariant_theorem_test_link_map.rs (1630L): theorem-to-test links
All SOUND, 0 bugs found.
